title: Netflix and Kill
review: A quadruple bill of new comics in Amsterdam. Went with Taylor. Two were ok, one was very questionable (sexist/transphobic), and Rogier Bak ended it well.
full_description: Netflix & Kill is a monthly comedy night showcasing international stand-up comedians on the rise to the top — comedians who deserve a Netflix Special. Hosted at Huis van Iemand Anders in De Pijp, bringing together some of the funniest local and visiting comedians from Europe and the US. May get a little dirty.
ai_summary: Amsterdam's English-language comedy night putting up-and-coming international comedians on stage in a De Pijp bar — stand-up from visiting touring comics who deserve their Netflix moment but aren't there yet.
